examples.title: Walking Paths
examples.content: Walk 5 km east, then 3 km north. Triangle: 5-3-hypotenuse. Hypotenuse (displacement) = √(5²+3²)≈5.8 km. The closing side of the triangle.

examples.title: Force Components
examples.content: Force A pulls at 30°, Force B pulls at 50°. The resultant closes the triangle formed by A, B. Result is the third side of the triangle.

examples.title: Boat Navigation
examples.content: Boat travels 6 km north, then 8 km east. Total displacement (hypotenuse) = √(6²+8²) = 10 km at an angle. Forms a 6-8-10 triangle!
